questions.q: In early May 2026, a federal prosecutor revealed that a Secret Service agent's vest was struck by buckshot from a man attempting to storm which major event?
Which budget airline announced in early May 2026 that it had nearly finished refunding customers after abruptly ceasing operations?
According to a May 4, 2026 publication by NASA's Earth Observatory, scientists analyzed satellite data to document the rapid ice loss and 'record-setting retreat' of which Antarctic glacier?
It was reported on May 4, 2026, that Apple abandoned its formal target to maintain what financial status in preparation for the AI arms race?
After winning Game 7 against the Tampa Bay Lightning, which team will the Montreal Canadiens face in the second round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs?
According to a May 2026 study, pediatric primary care telemedicine visits led to a significantly lower rate of unnecessary prescriptions for what compared to in-person visits?
Despite a federal excise tax holiday, the average price of regular gasoline surged past what mark per litre across British Columbia in early May 2026?
According to the WHO in a May 2026 report, an outbreak of what suspected rodent-transmitted virus left three people dead on a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean?
On May 4, 2026, ABC News Australia reported that police officers' locations could be tracked due to a Bluetooth security flaw in which devices?
Prime Minister Mark Carney recently called an alleged privacy breach in Alberta deeply concerning after what separatist group published an elector list in an app?
